name: anime-fx-reference
description: A curated AnimeFX reference plugin that helps AI agents discover, understand, reuse, and adapt verified motion code in web and video projects.

interface.shortDescription: Find and adapt verified motion effects for web and video projects.
interface.longDescription: Search 88 curated AnimeFX effects, inspect their source code, previews, examples, constraints, and reuse or adapt them inside the user's current project.
interface.defaultPrompt: Find a suitable verified AnimeFX effect for this project and adapt it to the current stack.
